column2:
Fix line 2 of castle art: replace `"        |  |                 |  |                 |  |"` with `"       _|  |_               _|  |_               _|  |_"`?

This fixes:
- Left margin mismatch (8→7 spaces, matching lines 0-1)
- Width mismatch (54→55 chars, matching lines 0-1)
- Missing `_` overhang on each side of tower body
- Tower walls align better with roof structure

See the before/after above. Approve?

Change line 4 from 3 dashes (`---`) to 5 dashes (`-----`) on both sides of middle tower? This fills the right gap exactly (60→64 chars). Middle tower stays centered at col 30.5.

If you meant only +1 dash (`----` = 4 dashes), that gives 62 chars — still 2 short of full width. Want 4 or 5?
